title: Luffy Lands on Alvida’s Ship
description: On pages 1–4, this part follows Luffy and Coby aboard Alvida’s ship, where Coby’s fear begins turning into a dream of his own.
scene: Luffy’s arrival disrupts Alvida’s ship and gives Coby the first real chance to say what he wants.

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: WHY IS THERE DUST ON MY BULWARK?

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: I-I thought I'd cleaned every inch of this ship...!!

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: I'll clean every- thing all over again! Please--!

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: Kobby! WhoIs the FAIREST throughout ALL the seas?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Ahem... heh heh... why YOU are... lady alvida!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: correct!! which is why i will not tolerate ANYTHING dirty!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: THE SHIP I SAIL IN MUST BE AS CLEAN AND BEAUTIFUL AS I AM. UNDERSTAND?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Remember, Koby, were it not for your vast KNOWLEDGE of the seas, I would feed you to the sharks! But don't push your luck!

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: y-yes... that's very KIND of you.

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: other than that, you're WORTHLESS! here, shine my shoes!!

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: DON'T WANT TO SEE EVEN ONE SPECK OF DUST ON THIS SHIP!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: If you've got time to grovel, then you've got time to scrub the toilet!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: WHAT'S THAT, KOBY? DID A BARREL OF RUN WASH UP ON THE BEACH?

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: Y-Yeah. And it's not empty! I wasn't sure what to do with it...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Well I know what to do with it! Let's drink it all up!

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: BUT IF THE CAPTAIN FINDS OUT, SHE'LL HAVE OUR HEADS!

summary: Luffy’s confidence contrasts with Coby’s fear. The section is about Coby slowly realizing that his dream is possible once someone refuses to treat Alvida as unbeatable.
